title: Tax' Creepy Illager
description: Creepy Villager is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to add glowing eyes to illagers.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/794b22064064a28649530d06f0e1d77375a04992.png)

Overview:
Creepy Villager is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to add glowing eyes to illagers.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d64d1c91ef1d1400608e5447484fa2bf491d8fe_0.webp)

Information:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack. Try out this amazing pack. ETF (Entity Texture Feature) mod is needet.

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .zip file in to the folder located at .minecraft/resourcepacks, or just simply use the Curseforge client.

Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this modification in your modpack. 

Credit:
Written by Taknax
